def negative_comparison_or_merge_logic_assumes_unique_keys_without_assertion():
    rule_id = "comparison_or_merge_logic_assumes_unique_keys_without_assertion"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag merge logic that silently assumes uniqueness of keys or identifiers."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
